title: Argentinian Grilled Meat Toast
description: A simple yet flavorful dish originating from Argentina, perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Slice the onions and set aside.
Brush the grates with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the Argentinian sausages for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the bread until lightly browned.
Once the sausages are cooked, let them rest for a minute before slicing.
Assemble the toast by placing a sausage on each slice, topping with a few onion slices and a sage leaf.
